summary: GC-Gruppe (GC-GROUP) is Europe's leading specialist wholesaler for sanitary, heating, and HVAC products. Founded in 1921 in Bremen, Germany. Family-owned alliance operating in 16 countries across Europe. Key brands include CORDES & GRAFE, WILHELM GIENGER, Odörfer (Austria), Comafranc (France), Pressiani (Italy), SVAI (Italy), Heidenreich (Norway). Focus on SHK (sanitation, heating, air conditioning) wholesale. Key contact: Thorsten Ludewig (thorsten.ludewig@gc-gruppe.de).
notes: Massive wholesale network across Europe. Ideal distribution partner for Hero Pumps circulating pumps. Already distributes heating/sanitary products. Family-owned, relationship-driven. Contact through Thorsten Ludewig for German market entry.
